// src/data/initialData.js

export const initialStaff = [
  { id: 1, name: "Prof. Nishad Patel", subject: "OSY, SFT", department: "Computer", email: "Npatel@college.edu", role: "teacher" },
  { id: 2, name: "Prof. C.P.Bhamare", subject: "OOP,MAD", department: "Computer", email: "bhamare@college.edu", role: "teacher" },

  { id: 4, name: "Prof. Chaitali Patil", subject: "Java", department: "Computer", email: "chaitali@college.edu", role: "teacher" },

  { id: 7, name: "Dr. Nivedita Mali", subject: "CSS", department: "Science", email: "anita@college.edu", role: "teacher" },

// Timetable: staffId -> [ { day, period, class } ]

export const DAYS = ["Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday"];
export const PERIODS = [1, 2, 3, 4];

  1: "8:00 - 9:00",
